name: cuebook-skills
description: Validation and release tooling for the Cuebook Agent Skills distribution.

scripts.build:release: node plugins/cuebook/scripts/build_release_skills.mjs plugins/cuebook skills && node plugins/cuebook/scripts/build_release_skills.mjs plugins/cuebook plugins/cuebook/public-skills
scripts.validate: npm run validate:english && npm run validate:plugin && npm run validate:closure
scripts.release:verify: npm run release:check && npm run check
scripts.check: npm run validate && npm run test:ci && npm run verify:release-bundles && npm run submission:check
